signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.modalDescription: Sign in to get more out of Thunderbolt
signIn.noLogs: No logs or training on your data
signIn.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
signIn.failedToSend: Failed to send verification code. Please check your connection.
signIn.failedToResend: Failed to resend verification code. Please check your connection.

otp.accessCodePrefix: If you have access, we've sent an 8-digit code to
otp.localhostPrefix: You appear to be using a
otp.localhostSuffix: backend. Check your backend server logs for the code or magic link.
otp.orClickMagicLink: Or click the magic link in your email

link.OTP_EXPIRED: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
link.INVALID_OTP: This link is invalid. Please request a new one.
link.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.

code.OTP_EXPIRED: This code has expired. Please request a new one.
code.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.

magicLink.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your link.
magicLink.invalidLink: Invalid verification link. Please request a new one.

sso.unableToConnect: Unable to connect to the identity provider. Check your network connection and SSO configuration.

signedOut.title: Signed Out
signedOut.description: You have been signed out successfully.

accountDeleted.title: Account Deleted
accountDeleted.description: Your account has been deleted and local data has been cleared.

waitlist.enterCodeHint: If you received a code to log in, enter it here:
waitlist.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
